title: Carnival Foods
description: Adds some carnival foods (cotton candy and hotdogs)! Made for ModFest: Carnival.
body:
# Carnival Foods!

Adds some foods from a carnival. More specifically: cotton candy (and machine), and hotdogs.

Made for ModFest: Carnival. **Huge thanks to the ModFest team for this event!**

### Cotton Candy

This mod adds a cotton candy machine, which you can use to make cotton candy by putting in some sugar (and dyes), and holding right click to it with a stick.

### Hotdogs

This mod adds hotdogs: a hotdog bun, hotdog by itself, hotdog in a bun, and a vegan "hotdog" (ew).
